meaning: n.(鞋后帮呈带状的)露跟女鞋
examples: Sarah Brown wowed onlookers with her “red slingback wedge sandals”, hailed by the Guardian as the campaign's best footwear so far.
By the time middle America catches on to a new style--say, slingback sneakers that slip on and have a strap in back--Skechers has a lower-priced lookalike in stores.
